+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cloudevents-93-http-mapping-strawman",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cloudevents: HTTP Mapping Strawman",
+    "description": "HTTP Mapping Strawman. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cloudevents setup",
+        "description": "Verify your cloudevents version:\nCloudEvents is a specification — check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)\nThis feature requires cloudevents as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cloudevents configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant cloudevents configuration:\nJust to capture a straw-man for HTTP mappings for discussion purposes - not about the mapping per-se (that might be too early at this point) but to illustrate concrete usage of the properties in the core spec."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for HTTP Mapping Strawman",
+        "description": "Refers to #93 \n\nThese two documents are proposals for the HTTP transport mapping and for the JSON event format. \n\nExpect some unprompted churn for the next couple of days while I add a further clarifications and examples and do fixups for links, etc.\n\nPlease ask each and all questions you may have\n```yaml\nPOST {external} HTTP/1.1\nCloudEvents-Namespace: azure.microsoft.com/storage\nCloudEvents-EventType: Microsoft.Storage.BlobCreated\nCloudEvents-EventTypeVersion: 2018-01-20\nCloudEvents-Version: 0.2\nCloudEvents-Topic: subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/Storage/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/xstoretestaccount\nCloudEvents-Subject: /blobServices/default/containers/oc2d2817345i200097container/blobs/oc2d2817345i20002296blob\nCloudEvents-EventId: 831e1650-001e-001b-66ab-eeb76e069631\nCloudEvents-EventTime: 2017-06-26T18:41:00.9584103Z\n**Content-Type**: application/x-my-opaque-bina\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"HTTP Mapping Strawman\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Refers to #93 \n\nThese two documents are proposals for the HTTP transport mapping and for the JSON event format. \n\nExpect some unprompted churn for the next couple of days while I add a further clarifications and examples and do fixups for links, etc.\n\nPlease ask each and all questions you may have here in the form of comments; all questions will help to make the spec more legible.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "POST {external} HTTP/1.1\nCloudEvents-Namespace: azure.microsoft.com/storage\nCloudEvents-EventType: Microsoft.Storage.BlobCreated\nCloudEvents-EventTypeVersion: 2018-01-20\nCloudEvents-Version: 0.2\nCloudEvents-Topic: subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/Storage/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/xstoretestaccount\nCloudEvents-Subject: /blobServices/default/containers/oc2d2817345i200097container/blobs/oc2d2817345i20002296blob\nCloudEvents-EventId: 831e1650-001e-001b-66ab-eeb76e069631\nCloudEvents-EventTime: 2017-06-26T18:41:00.9584103Z\n**Content-Type**: application/x-my-opaque-binary\nContent-Length: 1234\n\n{Data}",
+        "POST {external} HTTP/1.1\nContent-Type: application/json\nContent-Length: nnnn\n\n{\n    \"namespace\" : \"azure.com\"\n /oc2d2817345i20002296blob\",\n    \"cloud-events-version\": \"0.2\"\n    \"event-type\": \"Microsoft.Storage.BlobCreated\",\n    \"event-type-version\": \"1\",\n    \"event-time\": \"2017-06-26T18:41:00.9584103Z\",\n    \"event-id\": \"831e1650-001e-001b-66ab-eeb76e069631\",\n   \"topic\": \"subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/Storage/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/xstoretestaccount\",\n    \"subject\": \"/blobServices/default/containers/oc2d2817345i200097container/blobs\n    \"schema-url\": \"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/master/specification/eventgrid/data-plane/Microsoft.Storage/stable/2018-01-01/Storage.json\",\n    \"data\": { \n      \"api\": \"PutBlockList\",\n      \""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
